Uragoga subfusca is native to tropical Africa and has been found in countries such as Cameroon, Gabon, and the Republic of Congo. The classification of Uragoga subfusca is further supported by its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. The plant's classification is an ongoing area of research, and new findings may continue to refine its classification in the future.
